0x2221: ・The set value is out of the range.・The network number set on the own station is different from one on the control station・The own station is set to extended mode, however, the control station is set to normal mode. Or, the own station is set to normal mode and the control station is set to extended mode.・The own station is set to "Extend" of "Link points extended setting" in "Application Settings", however, the control station is set to "Not to Extend". Or, the own station is set to "Not to Extend" and the control station is set to "Extend".・The set value is out of the range. Or the parameter of the master station that requires the reset of the device station is changed.
